name: Utah mine worker with hearing loss, special rules?

mainEntity.name: Utah mine worker with hearing loss, special rules?

acceptedAnswer.description: Standard Utah comp applies; 1-year SOL from last exposure.[3] Context: Sites like Kennecott have high noise, strong claims if unprotected.[3] Key factors: Scheduled binaural loss benefits.[3] Practical guidance: File with Labor Commission, document mine noise; attorney handles.[3][7] Industry common.
